extDescription.message: Block websites that may contain malware.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in chrome://extensions and the Web Store.

popupDescription.message: Malaware blocks websites you add to a list. If you try to visit a blocked domain you are redirected to a warning page.

importHint.message: Paste a filter list (e.g. uBlock format: ||example.com^) or one domain per line.

msgFileAdded.message: File "$NAME$" added. Click Save to confirm.

msgStandardAlreadyPresent.message: Standard list already present ($TOTAL$ total). Click Save to confirm.

msgStandardAdded.message: Standard list added (+$ADDED$, $TOTAL$ total). Click Save to confirm.

msgStandardFailed.message: Could not import the standard list.

msgConfirmClear.message: Text area is empty — clear the entire block list?

msgSaveFailed.message: Could not save the block list.
